history.title: Software Engineer
history.description: Built scalable REST APIs using Python and FastAPI; managed PostgreSQL databases; deployed microservices on AWS; led code reviews and mentored junior developers.

history.title: Junior Developer
history.description: Developed React frontend applications; integrated third-party payment and analytics APIs; built backend services with Node.js and MongoDB; implemented CI/CD pipelines.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform with React frontend and Django REST backend, handling 10k+ daily users, product catalog, shopping cart, and payment integration.

projects.name: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a real-time analytics dashboard using WebSockets, FastAPI, and React with interactive data visualisation charts and time-series aggregation.

projects.name: Microservices Migration
projects.description: Led migration of a monolithic application to microservices architecture; implemented service mesh, message queues, and distributed tracing.
